ideas.headline: OKX IPO arb: 54-cent cross-venue gap is free money
ideas.pitch: 54c cross-venue gap between Kalshi (68c) and Polymarket (14c) on OKX IPO in 2026. This is the single largest cross-venue arb in today's dataset with confidence score 1.0. Sell NO on Kalshi and buy YES on Polymarket simultaneously — the gap should compress as arbitrageurs enter. With Iran de-escalation reducing capital markets uncertainty, IPO windows re-open and the Polymarket price is the clear laggard.

ideas.headline: Bitcoin Kalshi upside contracts mispriced at 50c — sell hard
ideas.pitch: All Bitcoin >$70K-$77K contracts on Kalshi are priced at exactly 50c (market maker default), while thesis-implied probability is 8-22c — giving 26-27c effective edge on the NO side. BTC is under geopolitical pressure: US sanctions on Iran, asset freezes, and conflict risk have crushed crypto. As Iran de-escalates, the risk-off bid for BTC as a sanctions hedge partially unwinds, but spot BTC is likely well below these strikes given current macro data (macro index 0: 686 suggests elevated fear). Sell YES / buy NO on all these contracts.

ideas.headline: WTI $105+ at 83c is stale — Iran talks kill the oil premium
ideas.pitch: WTI $105 contract surged +34c to 83c on Iran/Hormuz disruption fears, but the April 15 conflict-ends contract has already moved to 68c (+20c) and diplomatic meeting markets are surging. The oil war premium is being unwound in real time — WTI upside contracts are the last domino to fall. The $104.9 Kalshi contract at current elevated levels represents a sell: fair value post-de-escalation is sub-50c. Gas prices above $4.18 also fell 5c to 11c, confirming downstream demand destruction narrative.

ideas.headline: Peru Fujimori margin-of-victory 0-5% at 40c is fair value — hold
ideas.pitch: Fujimori surged to 53c (+20c) on $1.15M volume as first-round results arrive. The 0-5% margin-of-victory contract sits at 40c (+7c) — this is a precisely calibrated bet on whether she wins narrowly or by a wider margin. With López Aliaga rising +13c, vote splitting is occurring on the right, which historically narrows Fujimori's margin. At 40c with real-time vote counting, this is a liquid, near-term resolution event with measurable edge.

ideas.headline: Trump China visit at 93c is 33c overpriced — sell the hype
ideas.pitch: 33c effective edge on Trump China visit NO — thesis-implied at 60c vs market at 93c on Polymarket. With US military assets pinned in Middle East managing Iran fallout, and Hungary's democratic pivot pressuring EU-US alignment on China policy, a Trump China trip in 2026 faces significant logistical and diplomatic headwinds. The 93c price implies near-certainty that is not warranted given competing foreign policy demands.

ideas.headline: Trump presidential actions lagging at 71c — contagion gap 34c
ideas.pitch: 34c contagion gap: the 'at least 2 presidential actions' contract spiked +90c but the 'at least 3 actions' contract sits at only 71c. If there are already 2+ actions confirmed this week, the marginal cost of a third is trivially low given Trump's executive action pace. This is a classic contagion lag — the trigger moved but the sibling didn't. Buy the 3+ contract at 71c; fair value is 85c+.

themes.label: Lithium Structural Repricing: Contradictory Signals Create Arb

ideas.headline: Lithium 154,999 strike rose while siblings fell — non-monotonic arb
ideas.pitch: The 154,999 CNY lithium contract rose +11c to 50c while the 153,999 and 152,999 CNY contracts FELL -7c to 44c each. This is mathematically impossible in a well-functioning market — a higher strike cannot have higher probability than a lower strike for the same underlying on the same date. The 44c price on the 153,999 strike vs 50c on the 154,999 strike represents a ~6c structural mispricing. Buy 153,999 YES, sell 154,999 YES as a pairs trade.

ideas.headline: Nasdaq below 23,600 at 9c: high IY contrarian buy on tech oversell
ideas.pitch: Nasdaq-100 below 23,600 by April 17 is priced at just 9c — implying only 9% probability of a meaningful equity selloff in the next 4 days. Given Iran conflict uncertainty, BTC under pressure, and gas prices trending lower (deflation signal), a risk-off episode is non-trivially probable. The IY on this contract is effectively infinite for a 4-day hold. At 9c with a 4-day tau, even a 15c fair-value implies ~67% return. This is the contrarian macro hedge.
